name: cognito-pr-review
description: Cognito Forms PR review with team-specific patterns. Hierarchical investigation-driven pipeline with deterministic TypeScript prep (GitHub API), Opus investigation agents, Sonnet sweep with 115 calibrated rules, EMA weight system, reuse-candidacy stage, and interactive pair-review via review-pr-buddy. Includes a lightweight, scope-targetable spot-check command for fast review of small or narrowly-scoped PRs.
